headline: Bail conditions restrict movement for 2,300 accused persons
context: Courts imposed restrictive bail conditions including travel bans and reporting requirements on 2,300 accused persons awaiting trial in 2024.

cards.big: 2,300 accused persons face restrictive bail conditions while awaiting trial
cards.sub: Travel bans, passport surrenders, and daily reporting imposed pre-conviction

cards.big: Criminal Procedure Code grants courts wide discretion on bail conditions
cards.sub: No proportionality guidelines exist for matching conditions to offence severity

cards.big: Presumption of innocence under Article 5 requires minimal pretrial restrictions
cards.sub: Restrictive bail conditions effectively punish accused before conviction

cards.big: 890 of 2,300 reported losing employment due to restrictive bail conditions
cards.sub: Economic impact on families compounds the injustice of presumed guilt

cards.big: Bail that destroys livelihoods punishes innocence as if it were guilt
High Court issued practice direction on proportionate bail conditions in 2025
